channel.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário

item.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário
item.description:
🚨 Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica
Visão geral:
• 1 com severidade Crítica
• 13 com severidade Alta
• 27 novas CVEs
• 0 novos advisories/exploits

────────────────────────────────────
Infraestrutura - Docker / ESX / Elastic / Grafana / Nginx / VMware / Zabbix

🚨 CVE-2026-5524 - Nginx
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Nginx
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 9.8
Resumo:
The Divi Form Builder plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Arbitrary File Upload leading to Remote Code Execution in all versions up to and including 5.1.8. This is due to insufficient file extension validation in the do_image_upload() function where user-supplied input from the acceptFileTypes POST parameter is directly interpolated into a regular expression used to validate uploaded files. Attackers can specify PH...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-5524
 
🚨 CVE-2026-13760 - Docker
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.3
Resumo:
OS command injection in the NodejsFunction Docker bundling pipeline (OsCommand helper) in AWS aws-cdk-lib on all platforms might allow a actor who controls dependency version strings in a project's package.json file to execute arbitrary commands on the host running the CDK toolchain via injected shell metacharacters in the OsCommand helper. This issue requires the actor to control the content of a package.json depend...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-13760
 
🚨 CVE-2026-56148 - Elastic
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Elastic
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 6.5
Resumo:
Uncontrolled Recursion (CWE-674) in Elasticsearch can lead to a denial of service via Excessive Allocation (CAPEC-130). An authenticated user can submit a specially crafted query that causes excessive resource consumption while the request is processed, which may render the affected node unavailable.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-56148
 
📰 FINRA issues cyber alert regarding NGINX critical vulnerability - FX News Group
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Nginx
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia está relacionada a Nginx no contexto de segurança da informação, com potencial relevância para monitoramento, prevenção ou resposta.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMirwFBVV95cUxObGRFZVZ5U2RiYnZRMmdFT25tZHcyWmFrcXlHbG16SjV4a25BUW5Qc1V1bTh5UnJZMHlYc2h2TmpxNlpkX1E3UHdDdHlOVERDUjNHY0w4TGx0ZGRLazVQY0hfa2NyUXlmQVBXOTNZbFo0ZlFMTlg2ZldNNndXV0szSjB4SFp5X084eHBJbkRtMHJGSW9RNmhzT252WWV4SkZHc3lvMHV1bkpUR0dDQWdB?oc=5
 
📰 Beyond Benchmarks: Engineering a Science-Grounded Validation for the Envoy AI Gateway
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: VMware
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
The enterprise adoption of Large Language Models (LLMs) presents profound architectural challenges that extend far beyond simply hosting a model. Organizations demand robust, high-performance API gateways capable of providing identity-based routing, strict rate limiting, zero-trust security, and granular observability. Managing LLM traffic is uniquely demanding because it typically involves long-lived, chunked HTTP/2...
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/07/02/beyond-benchmarks-engineering-a-science-grounded-validation-for-the-envoy-ai-gateway/
 
────────────────────────────────────
Segurança - Acronis / Axur / Check Point / Harmony SASE / Qualys / SentinelOne

🚨 Ransomware Groups Turn to Citrix Bleed 2, BYOVD, and Supply Chain Credentials
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Threat actors associated with the Anubis ransomware operation have been observed exploiting the Citrix Bleed 2 (CVE-2025-5777) vulnerability to obtain initial access. "Although tactics differ between affiliates, common patterns emerged in tradecraft through use of legitimate Remote Management and Monitoring (RMM) tooling, credential access, and hands-on-keyboard procedures used for lateral
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/07/ransomware-groups-turn-to-citrix-bleed.html
 
🚨 CVE-2026-58592 - Check Point
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 8.3
Resumo:
Ladybird contains a dangling-reference memory-safety flaw in its WebAssembly ESM-integration module loader. When a JavaScript function is imported into a WebAssembly module via the ESM path, WebAssemblyModule.cpp passes a stack-local Wasm::FunctionType by reference to create_host_function, whose host callback captures and later reads that reference; once the ESM link-loop iteration ends the FunctionType is destroyed,...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-58592
 
📰 Critical vulnerability exposures double, Check Point finds - SecurityBrief Australia
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia está relacionada a Check Point no contexto de segurança da informação, com potencial relevância para monitoramento, prevenção ou resposta.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMilwFBVV95cUxQOVp2R1ZKd2JLdXBhWVJ2RWpzbm9yeE9OT0lsV0ZWeHdMQ09DeENlRHJnTjZpSzV1VzY1V1RpMHlkYl9GQzdqZHBMbnFHMFhOQ2ViMURRQVB2MV81TTFHQzBBNEdEVWZYdEdpTE1Sbm8xSnV3ZGhqUS1rTHVHU09oRXVmbkd5X2gwM216djhoc1VJQjByZzNr?oc=5
 
📰 ConsentFix and ClickFix: How Microsoft 365 Accounts are Hijacked in 3 Seconds
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
ConsentFix and ClickFix attacks steal Microsoft 365 tokens in seconds using fake prompts and OAuth flows. Learn how these MFA bypass tactics work and how to defend against them.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/consentfix-and-clickfix-how-microsoft-365-accounts-are-hijacked-in-3-seconds/
 
📰 ToddyCat-Linked Umbrij Malware Abuses OAuth to Access Gmail via Google API
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
The threat actor known as ToddyCat has been attributed to a new malware called Umbrij that's designed to gain surreptitious access to a victim's email correspondence via the Google API. "In this campaign, the attackers focused their attention on corporate email communications hosted on Gmail, targeting access compromise via APIs," Kaspersky said in a detailed report published this week.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/07/toddycat-linked-umbrij-malware-abuses.html
 
────────────────────────────────────
Sistemas / Cloud - 1Password / Azure / Office / Ubuntu / Windows Server / WordPress

🚨 USN-8501-1: Linux kernel vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
It was discovered that a logic flaw existed in the XFRM ESP-in-TCP subsystem in the Linux kernel when handling socket buffer fragments. A local attacker could use this to escalate privileges, or possibly escape a container. (CVE-2026-43503) Several security issues were discovered in the Linux kernel. An attacker could possibly use these to compromise the system. This update corrects flaws in the following subsystems:...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8501-1
 
🚨 CVE-2026-26145 - Azure
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Azure
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 4.8
Resumo:
Improper access control in Azure Synapse allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges over a network.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-26145
 
🚨 USN-8500-1: Vim vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: 4.0
Resumo:
It was discovered that Vim incorrectly handled path traversal in the zip.vim plugin. An attacker could possibly use this issue to overwrite arbitrary files. This issue only affected Ubuntu 14.04 LTS, Ubuntu 16.04 LTS, Ubuntu 18.04 LTS, Ubuntu 20.04 LTS, and Ubuntu 22.04 LTS. (CVE-2026-35177) It was discovered that Vim incorrectly handled depth tracking when processing spell files. An attacker could possibly use this...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8500-1
 
📰 USN-8503-1: ncurses vulnerability
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
It was discovered that ncurses incorrectly handled certain terminfo entries in the infocmp tool. An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause a denial of service via a crafted terminfo file. The default compiler options for affected releases should reduce the vulnerability to a denial of service.
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8503-1
 
📰 Cloud Hidden, Rationale Unknown: The DMA’s Foggy Attack on AWS and Azure | Blogs | Jul 2, 2026 - Information Technology and Innovation Foundation (ITIF)
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Azure
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Azure, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMioAFBVV95cUxOeS04YjllZ1pzYWVhRjAtZi1BVTlsa1kwR0VZVDlENHlZcTQ3ZjhXVU9Nb3FfbE9wX0MtRmxNMjNfbjNrcWxTQWltU0RJSFQ2YkZnZ0M3UVllNG5BbWJVb04ycXIzTWZ0b0RRRVdUc2FzU2Zhd3RKT3VyTVZOQXliWnRSclNDOWlreDBmNlFzbDdaQ29lZHNIQmcxOW9nRl9E?oc=5
 
📰 Six people missing in Kyiv after Russia's overnight attack; rescue teams continue clearing rubble - Українська правда
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Office, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
📰 LSHIY Password Spray Attack Hits Microsoft 365 Accounts With 81 Million Login Attempts - gbhackers.com
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Office, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMihAFBVV95cUxPMVNGZExPYVRGR041T1NyTGFTR2dGNGhhSXVLUVlMaWgwYWZOWVltZkwtcklUUFVlaGlld0QwdjRTMURNYUEzSkpFdFdLMnh2SDl0X090OHo0NlpvM3RFT1M0TTY4UVVLcXFDdXJRZ2FESHY4VFJadmVBenUzeGNCT0Ztb2Y?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Período: Notícias dos dias 01/07/2026 e 02/07/2026.
